scripts.build: pnpm run clean && pnpm --filter @chris-lally/cli-fumadocs run build && pnpm --filter @chris-lally/cli-git run build && pnpm --filter @chris-lally/cli-opensrc run build && pnpm --filter @chris-lally/cli-db run build && pnpm --filter @chris-lally/cli-repo run build && pnpm --filter @chris-lally/cli-npm run build && pnpm exec tsup --config tsup.config.ts
scripts.check-types: pnpm --filter @chris-lally/cli-fumadocs run build && pnpm --filter @chris-lally/cli-git run build && pnpm --filter @chris-lally/cli-opensrc run build && pnpm --filter @chris-lally/cli-db run build && pnpm --filter @chris-lally/cli-repo run build && pnpm --filter @chris-lally/cli-npm run build && tsc --noEmit
scripts.verify:bundle: pnpm run verify:pack && echo 'Checking for runtime workspace imports...' && sh -c '! grep -R --line-number --include="*.js" "@chris-lally/cli-" dist'
